result:
Written to `ate-out/T1-call-chain.txt`. The chain is:

```
ChatController.stream  (POST /api/chat/stream → SseEmitter)
  → AgentOrchestrator.streamTurn  (bind workspace, assemble Prompt with history/skills/@file-refs)
    → ChatService.streamWithTools  (resolve ChatModel via ChatModelFactory)
      → ToolRegistry.beans()  [from Tools.java: fileTools, shellTools]
      → ToolCallbacks.from()  [Spring AI: Object[] → ToolCallback[]]
      → ToolEventEmittingCallback.wrapAll()  [decorator for SSE events]
      → ChatClient.prompt(prompt).toolCallbacks(wrapped).stream().chatResponse()
        → Spring AI tool loop: model → ToolCallback.call() → FileTools/ShellTools @Tool methods
```
